source_posts.name: Paelah
source_posts.source_title: Signature Seafood Paella ($10.90)
source_posts.excerpt:
Signature Seafood Paella ($10.90)
From Paelah. The waiting time was abt 20min evrmen though there was no queue. The portion is generous. The seafood is really fresh. The tomato sauce in the ricr adds
